hypothesis: Augmenting CAST's concept bottleneck with binary substructure concepts (e.g., Murcko scaffold or functional-group presence) and training with a joint NMSE-plus-BCE loss will enable the steered LLM to retain a specified scaffold in at least 90% of generated valid molecules while achieving QED and LogP MAEs within 20% of CAST's baseline MAEs on the same out-of-distribution property targets.
